title: Complete a browser-wallet paid loop
goal: Complete a canonical autonomous bounty and receive automatic Base USDC settlement, with the public browser-wallet flow offered as the suggested non-gating path.
acceptance_criteria: The solver wallet is not the creator and owns the first confirmed canonical claim round.
The solver submits nonzero submission and evidence hashes before the claim deadline.
The proof nonce produces a Keccak-256 hash with at least 16 leading zero bits when ABI-encoded with the exact bounty id, round, solver, submission hash, evidence hash, and policy hash.
A permissionless verifyAndSettle(bytes) call succeeds before the verification deadline.
A confirmed canonical BountySettled event pays the solver reward, returns the solver bond, and pays the deterministic verifier recipient.

verification_policy.rubric: The immutable module passes only when the exact scope-bound work hash has at least 16 leading zero bits. Browser usage and feedback are not payout conditions.
